final: The `total()` function in `solution.py` was incorrectly using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element from the sum. I've updated it to `sum(xs)` so it returns the sum of all elements. The tests now pass.

transcript.final: The `total()` function in `solution.py` was incorrectly using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element from the sum. I've updated it to `sum(xs)` so it returns the sum of all elements. The tests now pass.
